name: RABBIT-SPEC-BACKLOG-3
title: generated_at ISO8601 format unspecified — no test asserts format consistency
description: The impl-suggestion schema requires a generated_at field but spec.md does not specify the exact ISO8601 format (with/without timezone, with/without microseconds, T vs space separator). Different invocations may produce subtly different formats. Specify the required format (e.g. YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ with UTC timezone, second precision) in spec.md and add a test asserting compliance.
